theme: Smallest grammar generating one long string
title: Mirror Grammar
strategies: trivial: one terminal per character plus a left-to-right concatenation chain
greedy: bottom-up RePair (iteratively merge the globally most-frequent adjacent symbol pair) -- concatenation only, no reversal rule

strong: top-down memoized recursive factoring that reuses an exact substring outright and, when a substring equals the REVERSE of an already-built one, spends a single reverse-rule instead of re-deriving the mirrored substructure
